# Garbage Files & Folders — AAA-v2
#
# This file lists all unwanted / auto-generated / duplicated / runtime artifacts
# that should be either deleted or added to .gitignore.
# Format: .gitignore-style paths with annotations.

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# ROOT LEVEL — Sensitive / Auto-generated / AI artifacts
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

cookies.txt                  # Netscape HTTP cookie file — generated by libcurl, contains session cookies
token.txt                    # JWT access token — sensitive, expired but should never be committed
settings.json                # IDE/tool config — contains redacted API key, model preference, approval mode
agent.md                     # Auto-generated architecture doc (2026-07-18) — AI inspection artifact
report-1-code-overview.md    # AI-generated codebase overview report (2026-07-22)
report-2-bugs-and-mistakes.md     # AI-generated bug report (2026-07-22)
report-3-architecture-improvements.md  # AI-generated improvement recommendations (2026-07-22)

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# BACKEND — Python bytecode caches (generated at runtime)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

backend/__pycache__/
backend/app/__pycache__/
backend/app/api/__pycache__/
backend/app/api/v2/__pycache__/
backend/agents/__pycache__/
backend/api/__pycache__/
backend/persistence/__pycache__/
backend/tests/__pycache__/

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# BACKEND — Test / Build / IDE caches
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

backend/.pytest_cache/           # pytest cache directory
backend/.vscode/                 # VS Code workspace settings
backend/aaa_backend.egg-info/    # setuptools build artifact — auto-generated by pip install -e .

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# BACKEND — Runtime databases (persisted data, not source code)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

backend/chroma_store/            # ChromaDB persistent vector store (chroma.sqlite3)
backend/data/                    # SQLite database (aaa.db) — runtime student/session data

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# BACKEND — Virtual environment (should already be in .gitignore)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

backend/.venv/                   # Python venv — large, machine-specific, reproducible via requirements.txt

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# BACKEND — OLD v1 CODE (duplicated / superseded by backend/app/)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

backend/agents/                  # Old Agent 1/2/3 — uses Gemini SDK directly (v2 uses ProviderFactory in app/agents/)
backend/agents/search_agent.py   #   → replaced by app/llm/tutor_service.py + app/graph/nodes/retrieve_web.py
backend/agents/syllabus_parser.py #  → replaced by app/agents/syllabus_parser.py (ProviderFactory-based)
backend/agents/tutor_quiz_agent.py # → replaced by app/llm/quiz_service.py + app/llm/evaluation_service.py
backend/api/                     # Old API (v1) — replaced by app/api/v2/
backend/api/routes.py            #   Old REST endpoints under /api/v1
backend/api/schemas.py           #   Old Pydantic models
backend/persistence/             # Old persistence layer — replaced by app/db/
backend/persistence/db.py        #   Old SQLite schema + connection (replaced by app/db/postgres.py)
backend/persistence/vector_store.py # Old ChromaDB client (replaced by app/db/chroma_client.py)
backend/main.py                  # Old FastAPI entrypoint — replaced by app/main.py
backend/config.py                # Old env-driven settings — replaced by app/core/config.py

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# BACKEND — OLD v1 TESTS (test the deleted v1 code above)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

backend/tests/test_agent1.py          # Tests old agents/syllabus_parser.py
backend/tests/test_agent2.py          # Tests old agents/search_agent.py
backend/tests/test_agent3.py          # Tests old agents/tutor_quiz_agent.py
backend/tests/test_api.py             # Tests old api/routes.py (v1 endpoints)
backend/tests/test_graph_routing.py   # Tests old orchestration/graph.py (v1 LangGraph)

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# BACKEND — AI-generated / draft specs
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

backend/agents.md               # AI-generated system design doc (v2.0 migration spec, Gemini API)
backend/uv.lock                 # uv package lock file — if using pip/requirements.txt, this is noise

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# BACKEND — Docker / deployment artifacts (unused? empty shell)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

backend/docker-entrypoint.sh    # Entrypoint script — keep if using Docker; otherwise garbage

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# INFRA — Empty placeholder directories
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

infra/ci/                       # Empty CI config directory
infra/k8s/                      # Empty Kubernetes config directory

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# DOCKER — Empty placeholder directory
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

docker/                         # Empty docker config directory

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# HIDDEN / WORKSPACE — Codewhale and agent runtime artifacts
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

.agents/                        # Agent skills directory (empty) — local dev tooling
.codewhale/                     # Codewhale workspace state, pastes, session data
